checks.finding: All AC-NNN identifiers cited in tasks.md (AC-001..AC-014, appearing in T-001/T-002 Done When items) resolve exactly to the AC-001..AC-014 identifiers defined in acceptance-tests.md; no dangling ID found (verified via full-file AC-NNN diff, both files enumerate the identical 14-member set).

T-001 Blockers: 'None' (literal). T-002 Blockers: 'T-001' (single valid T-\d{3} ID). No range notation or prose found. Consistent with precheck-result.json's blockers_format_valid: true. blockers_format_valid = true.

requirements.md Goals define REQ-001..REQ-004; all four appear in tasks.md Requirements fields (T-001: 'REQ-001, REQ-003 (share), REQ-004'; T-002: 'REQ-002, REQ-003 (share)'). REQ-006 is cited only in requirements.md prose (REQ-003 body, Assumptions) as a sibling-feature (epic-159-pillar-a) rule this feature does not implement; traceability.md's REQ-006 row records this as an explicit, reasoned N/A ('not a goal of this feature ... no task, test, or deliverable of this feature implements it'), matching the round-1-established intentional-deferral treatment. No uncovered own-requirement found.

acceptance-tests.md defines AC-001..AC-014; every one is traced to a task via Done When items with explicit AC-NNN citations (AC-001..006 -> T-001; AC-007..010 -> T-002; AC-011/AC-012 -> both T-001 (CREATE, 'share') and T-002 (APPEND, 'share'); AC-013/AC-014 -> T-001). traceability.md's Acceptance Mapping table independently corroborates the identical mapping. No uncovered AC found.
T-001 Requirements: 'REQ-001, REQ-003 (share), REQ-004'. T-002 Requirements: 'REQ-002, REQ-003 (share)'. Both tasks reference at least one REQ-NNN; no orphan task found.

No task in tasks.md qualifies as a 'test task' under the check definition: T-001's title is 'Add the bump-version.sh loop-gate prerequisite' and T-002's is 'Add the release.yml required loop-gate job' -- neither contains 'test'/'spec'/'verify', and neither task's scope is exclusively test-file changes (each Commit A bundles a script/workflow edit with its test-suite twin and CI wiring, and each Commit B is documentation). The scoped surface this check targets does not exist, matching the calibration's Cannot-Verify SKIP guidance (analogous to 'a bugfix diagnostic check when no task is a bugfix task').

Attempt 1, round 2 (not round 1): both T-001 and T-002 declare 'Approval: Draft' (not 'Approved') and 'Status: Planned' (a valid member of {Planned, In Progress, Blocked}). Compliant with the subsequent-round rule.

T-001: Risk: medium / Required Workflow: acceptance-first -- matches risk-gate-matrix (medium -> acceptance-first). T-002: Risk: medium / Required Workflow: acceptance-first -- matches. precheck-result.json records workflow_match_precheck: 'PASS', consistent with this independent verification. No mismatch or missing field.

AC-011 and AC-012 are each referenced by both T-001 and T-002, but with explicit, non-redundant scope differentiation: T-001's Done When items are labeled '(TEST-011 share)'/'(AC-011 share)' and '(TEST-012 share)'/'(AC-012 share)' and require CREATE-scoped content (new CHANGELOG entry; new runbook file+CLI section); T-002's corresponding items require APPEND-scoped content (extend the same CHANGELOG entry; append the release.yml runbook section) and explicitly state 'not duplicated as a second block'. traceability.md's Acceptance Mapping table documents the same split ('T-001 (CREATE ...), T-002 (APPEND ...)'). This is a distinct-scope shared reference, not two tasks claiming the identical primary test target -- no other AC-NNN appears in more than one task's Done When.
T-002's sole Blockers entry ('T-001') resolves to an existing task; dependency-graph.json nodes = ['T-001','T-002'] confirms both task IDs exist. No dangling task reference.

Runs because BLOCKERS-FORMAT = PASS. dependency-graph.json edges = [{'from':'T-002','to':'T-001'}] -- a single edge over two nodes; following it from T-002 to T-001 never revisits a node. No cycle exists.

Neither task title uses 'and' to join distinct feature concerns. Each task's Goal/Scope bundles one prerequisite-feature edit with its own locking test-suite twin (SINGLE-CONCERN exception 1: verification work directly tied to the first clause) plus CI-registration and same-PR documentation (exception 2: mandatory housekeeping per design.md's 'doc-following in same PR' Constraint Compliance row and the Global Constraints CREATE/APPEND convention). T-001 = the bump-version.sh loop-gate leg only; T-002 = the release.yml loop-gate leg only -- no unrelated second feature concern is bundled into either task.

T-001 has 11 Done When bullets, T-002 has 7 (18 total, verified by direct count), matching the round-2 remediation's stated expansion. A grep scan for forbidden vague verbs ('ensure', 'consider', 'works correctly', 'verify is correct', bare 'confirm'/'review') across tasks.md found only 'confirm it still exits 0' (T-001 bullet 10, T-002 bullet 6) -- paired with a specific observable result (exit 0 of tests/validate-repository.sh), not a bare unqualified confirm. Every bullet names a concrete TEST-NNN id with its exact assertion (exit code, git status --porcelain empty, grep self-check, line-number comparison, text-marker slice check), a concrete file+content requirement (CHANGELOG.md '## Unreleased' entry citing #148; docs/contributor/release-runbook.md content), or a concrete command result (tests/validate-repository.sh exits 0). Both non-documentation-only tasks (T-001, T-002) each include multiple Done When items naming a concrete verification command or evidence artifact (e.g., TEST-001..010, tests/validate-repository.sh exit 0, implementation-report RED/GREEN evidence).

Both T-001 and T-002 have entries in traceability.md's Task Mapping and Deliverables tables. Every requirement ID in traceability.md (REQ-001, REQ-002, REQ-003, REQ-004, REQ-006) appears in requirements.md -- REQ-006 appears there as a cited sibling-feature rule (REQ-003 body, Assumptions) with traceability.md recording a reasoned N/A deferral row for it. Full-profile layer-spec anchors verified as canonical and resolvable against the hash-bound layer documents: REQ-001 -> security-spec.md#trust-boundaries (matches security-spec.md's '## Trust Boundaries' heading) and infra-spec.md#runtime-budget (matches infra-spec.md's '## Runtime Budget' heading); REQ-002 -> security-spec.md#trust-boundaries and infra-spec.md#cicd-sequence (matches '## CI/CD Sequence'); REQ-003 -> reasoned 'N/A -- cross-layer only' with a stated rationale; REQ-004 -> infra-spec.md#observability (matches '## Observability'). No dangling reference or unresolvable anchor found.
